reasoning: The question asks whether the daily Henry Hub natural gas spot price will increase between 2026-03-29 and 2026-04-05 (a 1-week horizon). Since both dates are Sundays, this likely compares the surrounding Friday values (March 27 vs April 3). Daily commodity spot prices are highly volatile and largely follow a random walk, placing the base expectation near 0.5. The FRED data trend analysis over the past month shows a slight predicted increase (recent value 2.99, predicted 3.02) and a linear model estimate of 0.55 probability for an increase. Seasonal patterns from prior years slightly boost the statistical expectation up to 0.61. Given the inherent unpredictability of short-term energy spot prices—which are easily swayed by weekly weather forecasts and inventory reports—I regress the model's 0.61 estimate toward 0.5, arriving at a final probability of 0.56.
